about.line.additional_windows: Additional numbers — longer windows and model-specific limits
about.line.warning_icon: ⚠  Yellow  — data may be outdated (repeated refresh failures)
about.line.normal: Normal  — usage is within comfortable limits
about.line.red: Red       — projected ≥ 120% at reset, or blocked (100%)
about.line.shows_usage: The menu bar shows your Claude usage as percentages.
about.secondary.100_percent_explain: If any usage window reaches 100%, Claude Monitor shows a 🛑 stop icon and replaces percentages by a countdown until the limit clears.
about.secondary.additional_explain: Longer windows and model-specific limits appear only when usage is significant and outpacing the remaining time. If a model-specific limit triggers, its all-models counterpart is also shown for context.
about.secondary.outpacing: "Projected at reset" means your current average rate × remaining time, predicting where utilization will be when the window resets.
about.secondary.refresh_explain: Claude Monitor adjusts how often it checks for updates. When your usage is actively changing, it checks more frequently. When usage is stable, it gradually checks less often to reduce network traffic. Use Refresh Now (⌘R) for an immediate update.
about.window.title: Claude Monitor – About
credentials.alert.invalid_org.message: Organization ID must be a valid UUID (e.g. xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx).
credentials.alert.invalid_org.title: Invalid Organization ID
credentials.alert.missing.message: Both Organization ID and Cookie header value are required.
credentials.alert.missing.title: Missing credentials
credentials.alert.save_failed.message: Credential storage failed. Try restarting the app.
credentials.alert.save_failed.title: Failed to save credentials
error.unauthorized: Session expired – update cookie in Preferences
guide.step4.prefix: 4. In DevTools, find the request URL:
guide.step5: 5. Click the same request → **Headers** → copy the entire **Cookie** header value
prefs.reset_sound: Play sound when critical limit resets
